alerts.title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
alerts.description: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

alerts.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
alerts.description: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

alerts.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
alerts.description: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

alerts.title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
alerts.description: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong — it's also diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates now that AI is part of it.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: South Korean AI Chipmaker Raises $400M for Inference
alerts.description: The evolving AI market presents opportunities for new players, such as Rebellions, to offer silicon diversity.

alerts.title: Uber raises stake in Delivery Hero in $318 million deal
alerts.description: Prosus has been forced by European regulators to sell down its Delivery Hero stake in order to proceed with a proposed acquisition of Just Eat.
